trends.context: The Paris 2024 Olympics opening ceremony has generated buzz with its spectacular performances and China's participation, leading to widespread discussions and live reactions on Douyin.
Apple's latest iPhone announcement has sparked excitement among tech enthusiasts in China, with users sharing unboxing videos, reviews, and comparisons on Douyin.
A high-profile celebrity couple's divorce announcement has gone viral, with fans debating the reasons and sharing memes, making it a hot topic on social media.
As summer approaches, a popular weight loss challenge involving quick workouts and diet tips has trended, with users posting their progress and results.
With the summer vacation season, recommendations for scenic spots in China like Zhangjiajie have surged, as users share travel vlogs and tips.
New AI tools for generating art have become a hit, with creators showcasing their works and tutorials, inspiring a wave of user-generated content.
Viral videos of exploring hidden gem restaurants in major cities have led to a foodie trend, with users trying and reviewing the spots themselves.
A K-pop group's concert tour in China has excited fans, leading to fan meetings, merchandise shares, and live streams on Douyin.
A national campaign for reducing plastic waste has gained traction, with users sharing eco-friendly tips and participating in challenges.
Influencers hosting live streams for product sales, especially beauty and fashion items, have seen massive viewership and purchases.
Recent reports of school bullying incidents have prompted widespread conversations on Douyin, with users sharing stories and calling for awareness.
A concert featuring virtual idols has captivated audiences, blending technology and entertainment, leading to fan art and reactions.
With rising health consciousness, videos sharing traditional Chinese medicine tips and modern wellness routines have become popular.
Highlights from a major esports event, like a League of Legends tournament, have gone viral, with gamers discussing strategies and outcomes.
As the Dragon Boat Festival approaches, users are sharing traditions like making zongzi and racing, fostering cultural exchange on the platform.
